[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”destination-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”flexone”][vc_custom_heading text=”Udaipur Destination Wedding Packages”][vc_column_text]Imagine marrying among beautiful forts and royal palaces, with pearl-like lakes surrounding you. In Udaipur, you get everything! It is one of India’s most popular wedding destinations. When it comes to destination weddings, Udaipur Destination Wedding packages are always at the top of the list.

If you’ve always wanted to marry like a princess, a wedding in Udaipur will bring you closer to realizing your dream. Udaipur has something for everyone, as to if you want to get married on an island, in the middle of a lake, in a lakeside fort with stunning sunset views, or a luxurious five-star resort.

Let us help you with some essential information before you book.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Tips for best Udaipur Destination Wedding Packages”][vc_column_text]Destination weddings in Udaipur have become increasingly popular. Natural beauty, luxury hotels from major chains, and traditional hospitality make this a popular wedding destination.

If you’re planning a destination wedding in Udaipur, we’ll want to bring a few tips with you. And, here they are.

Plan ahead: –

Make sure to plan when it comes to Udaipur Destination Wedding Packages. Because it is one of the most popular wedding destinations, finding the wedding venue of your choice may take some time.

Notify your guests in advance: –

It’s important to give your guests enough time to figure out whether or not they can afford to travel to the destination. We suggest starting at least three months ahead of time, if not sooner.

Be aware of the weather: –

When deciding on a date for your destination wedding, the weather of the city is crucial. Because Udaipur experiences high temperatures from March to June, September to February is the best time to host a wedding there. These months are ideal for you and your guests to explore the wonders of the ‘City of Lakes.’

Make Use of Local Vendors: –

When you first arrive in Udaipur, ask the venue on the ground for vendor recommendations. Hiring local vendors is one of the best ways to save money when planning a destination wedding because they don’t have to travel or stay anywhere. In Udaipur, set up meetings with local florists and rental companies. Who knows, you might just discover a hidden gem in your backyard.

Adding a Rajasthani Touch: –

Whether you’re planning a wedding in a palace, a resort, or a 5-star hotel in Udaipur, you can always add a Rajasthani touch. Begin by deciding on royal-themed attire for the bride and groom. A sherwani with pajama or dhoti and a waistband or a Kamarbandh can be worn by the groom. The bride can wear a ghagra, choli, and odhani in a bright colour.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the cost of the Udaipur Destination Wedding package?”][vc_column_text]When planning a destination wedding in Udaipur, the number of guests, the number of days, and the number of functions are the most important factors to consider. In Udaipur, the average wedding budget is between 30 and 60 lakhs. For Udaipur Destination Wedding Packages with a guest list of about 150 people and a three-day celebration, you’ll need a minimum budget of around 30 – 60 lakhs. However, it is heavily influenced by the following factors:

  • Venue: – You must first decide whether you want to host the function and accommodate the guests in the same place. If it is not possible to accommodate guests at the function’s location, book a hotel near the location. There are both luxury hotels and budget hotels to choose from for a grand celebration or an intimate gathering.
  • The number of days: – The festivities usually last 3 to 4 days at a destination wedding. If you don’t want your wedding budget to balloon, it’s best to wrap up the festivities in two or three days.
  • List of Guests: – When planning a destination wedding in Udaipur, most people do not invite a large number of guests. Only close family and friends are invited to such a gathering, and the guest list is kept to a maximum of 150-200 people.

Of course, there is a slew of other factors that can influence your wedding budget, including photographers, makeup artists, entertainment, and transportation from the
hotel to the venue.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Which part of Udaipur is best for a Destination Wedding?”][vc_column_text]Udaipur, considered India’s most romantic city, is rich in history, culture, and scenic locations. Beautiful lakes surround it, as well as charming old palaces, forts, and temples. The city comes alive at night with many warm lights, creating a romantic atmosphere.

The best part about destination weddings in Udaipur is that no matter which venue you choose for your nuptials, the likelihood of having a Lakeview is quite high. The most beautiful moment of your life is undoubtedly tying the knot with your soulmate. And there’s no better way to remember special moments than in one of Udaipur’s royal palaces, far from the hustle and bustle of the city.

Because of its magnificent forts and palaces, Udaipur is one of the best destinations for theme weddings. The opulence of these hotels ensures that your destination wedding in Udaipur is one to remember for not only the bride and groom but for everyone.[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Best place for Destination Wedding in Udaipur”][vc_column_text]Choosing a location for such a special occasion is undoubtedly a difficult task. There are many best destination wedding venues in Udaipur that people book for such a special celebration. However, to help you choose the best destination wedding locations in Udaipur, we have compiled a list of some places that will ensure it is the best destination wedding places in Udaipur.

  • The Oberoi Udaivilas:- When you think of a destination wedding in Udaipur, the very first luxury hotel that comes to mind is the Oberoi Udaivilas. Some movies were shot in this palace, making it even more popular, such as the famous Bollywood film ‘Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani.’ It is located on the shores of Lake Pichola, with breath-taking views. They offer lavish banquets for pre-and post-wedding occasions. Enjoy Indian cuisine, live music, and romantic views of Lake Pichola under the starry night-painted dome.
  • The Leela Palace Udaipur:-This luxurious 5-star hotel is well-known throughout the world for its exotic setting and elegant ambiance. It is a modern palace that evokes the grandeur and opulence of the Land of Mewar. The rooms offer beautiful views of the heritage city and the mountains. Afternoon tea at Sheesh Mahal overlooking the lake and romantic boat rides with soothing music are highlights of the evenings.
  • Fatehgarh Udaipur:- Most wedding planners recommend the fort because it is situated around the Aravalli hills, making it one of the best Udaipur destination wedding royal palaces. This location goes out of its way to make an important event in your life memorable. In addition, the Baradari restaurant serves regional and Indian cuisine. The Amritam bar serves a variety of cocktails and international wines.
  • City Palace: –The City Palace is a colourful fusion of Mughal and Rajasthani architectural styles built atop a hill. Like Fateh Prakash Palace and Shiv Niwas Palace, parts of the palace have been converted into luxury hotels. For royal weddings, historical courtyards like Manek Chowk, Zenana Mahal, and Durbar Hall are available in addition to resorts. This is the best place for your Udaipur destination wedding if you want something different and royal.
  • Chunda Palace: –The palace has a heritage look and feel that can accommodate around 200 guests and is one of the best choices for a small wedding. The caterers here can arrange for live counters, authentic chaat stalls, or exotic cuisines in both veg and non-veg cuisines. The multiple party areas will allow you to host multiple functions under the same roof at the same time.

[/vc_column_text][vc_custom_heading text=”Best resorts to stay in Udaipur for the wedding ceremonies”][vc_column_text]A destination wedding in Udaipur is the epitome of a big fat Indian wedding. Udaipur is a beautiful wedding destination because of its rich heritage and beautiful lakes. In Udaipur, there are numerous palaces and Havelis that have been converted into resorts for your destination wedding. Palace Destination Wedding in Udaipur has the next level of royal touch.

  • Jagmandir Palace: –
    It is one of the city’s most upscale properties and has hosted many celebrity weddings. Get the ‘paradise-like feel by decorating this luxurious resort with fairy lights. Ravina Tandan, a Bollywood actress, married at Jagmandir Palace. Jagmandir Palace customizes wedding packages to fit every guest’s budget. This ultra-modern property promises a lavish wedding.
  • Raas Devigarh:-
    The resort is a perfect example of Rajputana culture, traditions, and history. It’s impossible to imagine a better way to spend your big Day than here. Raas Devigarh is undoubtedly the most lavish wedding venue in Udaipur. Enjoy a comfortable stay in one of its well-appointed suites or rooms while having a blast.
  • Radisson Blu Udaipur Palace Resort & Spa: –
    The Radisson Blu, located on the banks of Fateh Sagar Lake, is an ideal destination venue in Udaipur. Everything about this hotel is regal and modern, from its banqueting spaces to its guest rooms. Celebrate your wedding day with the hotel’s dedicated staff, who promise top-notch service to all of its visitors.
  • Ananta Udaipur: –
    Ananta is a high-end resort with modern comforts and amenities. Its banquets are spacious and equipped with cutting-edge technology, ensuring that every event runs smoothly and without hassle. Relax amid nature while spending quality time with your family.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text]

FAQs about Udaipur Wedding Destination

How much does a destination wedding in Udaipur cost?
Udaipur Destination Wedding cost around INR 15 lakhs, with the total cost potentially reaching INR 60 lakhs. A royal wedding in Udaipur will cost between INR 1 lakh and 1.5 lakhs. Wedding venues in Udaipur with prices that are affordable is a dream wedding for many Indians.
When is the Best Time to get married in Udaipur?
The months of September to March are ideal for planning a destination wedding in Udaipur. The weather is pleasant at this time. From March to June, temperatures are usually high (Summers).
Do you pay for guests at the destination weddings?
The budget for one night would be around INR 20 lakh (for the first 100 guests); for a guest list of 200 guests, the charges would be 20 lakhs (for the first 100 guests) + 9,000 INR for 101-200 guests; prices would go down if you had a large guest list.
How do I Book a Venue or best destination wedding resorts in Udaipur for a Destination Wedding?
You must take the essential steps, such as:
  • Consult with your planner.
  • Choose a location.
  • Consider your guest list.
  • Don't forget about your budget.
Once you have these requirements, search for companies that offer the best destination wedding places in Udaipur within your budget. And once you've located them, contact them via their official website.
Do you organize only Weddings or other events as well?
ATW Travels specializes in organizing group trips and vacations to various places. They do, however, offer you their assistance in a variety of areas, including educational, international, Indian, and honeymoon packages.
Is a Destination Wedding being safe during the pandemic time?
Yes, a destination wedding is safe if everyone takes precautions and follows Covid-19 guidelines.
